description: FhirResourceNormalizerComponent — flatten FHIR R4/R5 resources to a DataFrame.

resource_column.label: Resource Column
resource_column.description: Column holding the FHIR resource. Values may be dicts OR JSON strings.

resource_types.label: Resource Types
resource_types.description: Optional filter — only emit rows for these resource types. E.g. ['Patient', 'Observation']. Default: all.

value_maps.label: Value Maps
value_maps.description: Per-column value normalization, like `hris_normalizer`. E.g. `{gender: {M: male, F: female}}`. Case-insensitive by default.

drop_invalid.label: Drop Invalid
drop_invalid.description: If True, silently drop rows whose resource is missing/un-parseable. If False, emit a row with `resource_type=null` and an `_error` column.

name: Fhir Resource Normalizer
